feedback: premetto che ho ricevuto queste cuffie col giochino dell' albero e le ho dunque pagate 9 centesimi . appena arrivate sembravano ben imballate ma aprendo la confezione mi sono resa conto che le cuffie erano invertite e il fondo graffiato. ne deduco che non siano cuffie nuove di pacca.  ma probabilmente oggetti restituiti e "regalati".  il suono non è buono. tollerabile? si. in caso non si abbiano altre cuffie a portata di mano. la carica è strana. a volte una cuffie inizia la carica e   altra no. la custodia è ingombrante. a volte ci sono problemi di sincronizzazione.
feedbackTranslated:
First of all, I received these headphones with the tree toy and therefore paid 9 cents for them. 
 As soon as they arrived, they seemed well-packaged, but upon opening the package, I realized that the headphones were reversed and the bottom was scratched. I deduce that these are not brand new headphones. but probably returned and gifted items. 
 the sound is not good. tolerable? Yes. in case there are no other headphones available. 
 the charge is strange. Sometimes one earbud starts charging and the other doesn't. 
 the case is bulky. 
 Sometimes there are synchronization issues.

feedback: в розмові абонента чую добре, але абонент мене чує погано, як з погребу. коробка прийшла пом'ята, але товар не пошкоджений
feedbackTranslated: I hear well in the conversation, but the other person hears me poorly, like from a grave. The box arrived wrinkled, but the product is not damaged.

feedback: Słuchawki po prostu tragedia. Problem z synchronizacją słuchawka - słuchawka, czasami się wyłączają same, bardzo słaba jakość rozmów telefonicznych, brak basów, płytkie wysokie dźwięki. TRAGEDIA!!! Z przykrością wystawiam negatywną opinię, bo myślałem, że produkt będzie wart. Słuchawki wygrałem w podlewaniu drzewka i zapłaciłem 39 gr, więc dużo nie straciłem. Odradzam ich kupna nawet za nieco ponad 2 duszki, bo tyle kosztują. Jedyne co, to są ładne, błyszczące jak i samo etui, i tyle.
feedbackTranslated: The headphones are simply a tragedy. There's a problem with the synchronization of the earpiece - sometimes they turn off by themselves, very poor quality of phone calls, no bass, shallow high sounds. TRAGEDY!!! I regret giving a negative review because I thought the product would be worth it. I won the headphones in a tree watering contest and paid 39 grams, so I didn't lose much. I advise against buying them even for slightly over 2 bucks because that's how much they cost. The only thing is that they are nice and shiny, just like the case itself, and that's it.

Add to that that in over 50 years, I have never once heard such abysmal sound quality in my life, even my Walkman from. 1982 sounded a million times better then these, and when I say these, I mean the 1 bud that kind of works, sometimes. Seriously, save tour money, and don't support scammers whose business model is to simply make junk, rip people off, then deny there is a fault

 battery issue and so on, I will update it with use... for now they seem to charge well.

Cuando lo conseguí me encontré con un sonido que parecía retumbar una lata. Se lo di a mi hija y me lo devolvió al rato diciendo que lo había probado en su teléfono y se oía mal. Le pongo una valoración neutral porque es verdad que en mi casa usamos audífonos premium con amplificadores entonces seguramente el auriculares no sea malo sino que nosotros estamos acostumbrados a escuchar la música de forma especial. Si hubiera pedido como regalo cualquiera otra cosa estaría encantada. y en cualquier caso, gracias Aliexpress por el lindo detalle.
feedbackTranslated: I received this item as a gift for watering the tree, but that doesn't mean I'm not going to tell the truth: it sounds bad. It doesn't have a loud sound like other reviews say (at least the one I received didn't), and it took me a lot of effort to get my iPad back. When I got it, I found a sound that sounded like a can being rattled. I gave it to my daughter and she returned it shortly after, saying that she had tried it on her phone and it sounded bad. I give a neutral rating because it's true that in my house we use premium headphones with amplifiers, so the headphones themselves are probably not bad, but we are used to listening to music in a special way. If I had ordered something else as a gift, I would be delighted. And in any case, thank you Aliexpress for the nice touch.

feedback: при получении обнаружил что панель на станции не светится. наушники не заражаются. оставил наушники на столе, станцию взял в левую руку и несколько раз ударил о правую руку (советский способ ремонта) всё заработало.функционал хороший: два касания старт/стоп, несколько касаний звонок последнему абоненту .музыка/разговор - 70/90 минут (зависит от громкости). громкость хорошая, микрофон без "шумодава" но в помещении приемлемо.совет: если если наушники не синхронизируются переключиться и поменяйте последовательность наушников .от станции можно заряжаться 4(четыре) раза за эти деньги - отличный вариант.
feedbackTranslated: Upon receipt, I discovered that the panel at the station does not light up. The headphones do not get infected. I left the headphones on the table, took the station in my left hand and hit it several times with my right hand (a Soviet-style repair method), and everything worked. The functionality is good: two taps for start/stop, several taps for calling the last contact. music/conversation - 70/90 minutes (depends on volume). The volume is good, the microphone doesn't have a noise canceller but it's acceptable indoors. Tip: if the headphones don't synchronize, switch them around and change the order of the headphones. The station can charge 4 (four) times for this price - an excellent option.

l'appairage est compliqué. Sur une fréquence constante de 500hz ou autres, l'écouteur de gauche fait des variations régulières de tonalité. Les aigus sont granuleux, ce qui fait penser à une compression du son type MP3 64k.
Quand je met pause j'entend un bruit de FAX. La voix qui prévient si c'est déconnecté ou OFF est trop forte !
Sur un Huawei je ne peux pas utiliser l'équaliseur car le volume sonore est extrêment haut et même au premier niveau c'est insupportable !
feedbackTranslated:
Pairing is complicated. At a constant frequency of 500hz or other frequencies, the left earphone has regular pitch variations. The treble is grainy sounding, making you feel like a compression of 64k MP3 type sound 
 When I put it on pause, I hear a fax noise. The voice warning when disconnected or OFF is too loud! 
 On a Huawei, I cannot use the equalizer because the sound volume is extremely high and even at the first level it's unbearable!

feedback: Not bad little earbuds- for the price they're not going to be AirPods. They sound a little tinny and the fit isn't perfect and probably wouldn't survive a run, but it's fine for general moving around.  Case is surprisingly large and low quality, but the earbuds themselves work great.   When delivered the left bud was in the right holder and vice versa. Because of this one bud was charged and the other flat, but after swapping them around they charge and work fine. Surprisingly for inexpensive buds my phone will connect seamlessly to the left, right, or both earbuds.  Case also has a USB-A port and can be used as a charging bank.   if the case were smaller and higher quality I'd happily pay much more than the price. Star ratings consider the price.
feedbackTranslated:
Not bad little earbuds- for the price they're not going to be airpods. They sound a little tinny and the fit isn't perfect and probably wouldn't survive a run, but it's fine for general moving around. 
 Case is surprisingly large and low quality, but the earbuds themselves work great. 
 
 When delivered the left bud was in the right holder and vice versa. Because of this one bud was charged and the other flat, but after swapping them around they charge and work fine. Surprisingly for inexpensive buds my phone will connect seamlessly to the left, right, or both earbuds. 
 
 Case also has a usb-a port and can be used as a charging bank. 
 
 If the case were smaller and higher quality i'd happily pay much more than the price. Star ratings consider the price.
addFeedback: Follow-up review because I just realised the entire surface of both earbuds is a capacitive touch sensor. In my experience inexpensive earbuds have one master bud that must always be connected and one slave bud that doesn't need to be worn.  Not only do these happily happily connect with either or both buds, but they have a large and very usable touch surface, and the case doubles as a charging bank.  The sound quality and fit are fairly poor, but absolutely usable - this is astonishing value for money!  photo shows a fully-charged left and charging right.

feedback: Quality of plastic case is very bad. Earbuds cannot firmly secure in their charging position due to weak magnet and case lid is not holding them when closed(intermittent charging in pocket). Case is lightweight and i don't think that has 2000 mah battery inside. Sound is at least bad. Only some higher frequencies are present with lots of distortion. feedback: Качество звука позволяет разве что слушать подкасты на ютубе. Слушать музыку не стоит. Заряд держится около 1 часа. С управлением вообще беда: работает через раз и на свое усмотрение, т.е. когда нужно изменить громкость, ставит на паузу и наоборот. Хуже всего то что , при минимальной громкости, женский голос внезапно орет мне в уши, сообщая о низком заряде наушников. При чем делает он это не синхронно а с задержкой. Этот опыт заделал меня на шаг ближе к инфаркту, спасибо.
feedbackTranslated: The sound quality is barely enough to listen to podcasts on YouTube. Not worth listening to music. The charge lasts about an hour. The control is a complete disaster: it works intermittently and at its own discretion, i.e., when I need to change the volume, it pauses and vice versa. Worst of all, at minimal volume, a female voice suddenly screams in my ear, informing me that the headphones are low on charge. Moreover, it does this not synchronously but with a delay. This experience made me one step closer to a heart attack, thank you.

50년생 기준을 다시 너무 강하게 적용하지 않는 것이 중요합니다.

It is important not to apply the 50-year-old standard too strictly again. 
 Due to being born in '62, one should not exert excessive force.

feedback:
제품은 제 역활을 충분히 합니다. 하지만 건전지가 LR1130 3개가 들어갑니다.

차라리 aaa 1개가 더 좋지 않을까 합니다. 그리고 연결되는 부분이 3개의 ㄱ자를 연결 하는데 잘못하면 분리가 쉽게 되니 연결해서 한 부분들 마다 접착제로 붙이면 도움됩니다.

불 들어오는 것은 만족하고 분위기 내는데 나쁘지 않습니다. 하지만 건전지 3개를 교체 해야 되는 부분의 번거로움을 가격대비 가성비로 하면 좋은 제품인듯 합니다.
feedbackTranslated:
The product does its job well. However, it requires three LR1130 batteries.  
  
 I think it would be better to have one more AAA. And the connecting part connects three L-shaped pieces, but if done incorrectly, they can easily come apart. So, connecting them and sticking each part with adhesive helps.  
  
 I am satisfied with the light coming on and it adds to the atmosphere; it's not bad. However, considering the hassle of having to replace three batteries, this product seems good in terms of cost-effectiveness.

feedback:
The on switch is broken. Push that knob to on mode and the lamp was lit for only a split second.
After I opend it I noticed a small metal bar that supposed to be pushed by the switch to close the circuite,
but the switch fails to keep that metal bar in place. This thing won't lit unless you keep pressing the metal bar.
Even when the light is on it is too weak for night reading.

Dont buy this!
feedbackTranslated:
The on switch is broken. Push that knob to on mode and the lamp was lit for only a split second.  
 After i opend it i noticed a small metal bar that supposed to be pushed by the switch to close the circuite,  
 But the switch fails to keep that metal bar in place. This thing won't lit unless you keep pressing the metal bar.  
 Even when the light is on it is too weak for night reading.  
  
 Dont buy this!

feedback:
Adquirí este producto después de ver varias recomendaciones y, sinceramente, la experiencia ha sido bastante positiva para el precio que maneja. Llegó bien empaquetado, sin daños y dentro del tiempo estimado, algo que siempre se agradece cuando se compra en línea. A primera vista, los materiales se sienten acordes al costo: no son de gama alta, pero tampoco dan la impresión de romperse con facilidad. Su diseño es simple, funcional y suficientemente práctico para el uso cotidiano.
En cuanto al desempeño, cumple exactamente con lo que promete. No ofrece características extraordinarias ni un rendimiento excepcional, pero es consistente, fácil de utilizar y no requiere mucha configuración. Para tareas básicas y de uso diario resulta adecuado, especialmente si no se busca algo profesional o de larga duración intensiva. Además, incluye algunos accesorios útiles que complementan la experiencia y amplían ligeramente sus posibilidades.
feedbackTranslated:
I acquired this product after seeing several recommendations and, honestly, the experience has been quite positive for the price it offers. It arrived well packaged, without damage and within the estimated time, something that is always appreciated when buying online. At first glance, the materials feel in line with the cost: they are not high-end, but they also don't give the impression of breaking easily. Its design is simple, functional and practical enough for everyday use. 
 As for performance, it delivers exactly what it promises. It doesn't offer extraordinary features or exceptional performance, but it is consistent, easy to use, and doesn't require much configuration. For basic tasks and daily use it is suitable, especially if you are not looking for something professional or long-lasting intensive use. Additionally, it includes some useful accessories that complement the experience and slightly expand its possibilities.

feedback:
La spedizione è arrivata nei tempi prestabiliti, il vestito, per quanto a prezzo contenutissimo, non ne vale la pena. Non è come in foto e non cinge correttamente la vita, dando l'idea di un corpo tozzo, senza esaltare correttamente le forme sinuose dei fianchi e della schiena. La soluzione chr ho trovato per "salvare" il prodotto è stata quella di associarci una cintura elasticizzata simil-corsetto che vada a valorizzare meglio il punto vita. Per il resto per un'altezza di 160cm la lunghezza è congrua, sicuramente molto superiore all'immagine (che invece rappresenta un prodotto che valorizza le curve, ma è decisamente troppo inguinale per i miei gusti).
In definitiva, se lo volete acquistare, sappiate che dovrete fare degli adattamenti almeno con gli accessori.
Qualité basse

It should be noted that the box arrived damaged, which is understandable due to logistics issues and such, but when I took it out and tried to use it (it should be noted that there was nothing inside) the string had trouble coming out and back in, and finally on the second attempt it broke.
